source_title: Long tool calls (~180s+) silently re-executed from checkpoint on LangGraph Cloud
pattern: A long-running tool call is redispatched because the runtime has no durable record that the original is still in flight; both complete, producing duplicate side effects and cost.
expected_guard: Before invoking a side-effect tool, claim a durable execution idempotency key; if the same key is already marked in-flight, return the pending result instead of re-executing.
